_meta.description: TradeClaw strategy library — versioned. Measured strategies carry real local-sample edge + decay tracking; candidate strategies are externally-cited setups pending real TradeClaw data. No invented strategies, no fabricated numbers.
_meta.provenance: LOCAL scanner/dev samples (apps/web/data/signal-history.json + scripts/signals.db) — NOT the production Railway Postgres verified record. Illustrative of the live engine; production rolling metrics resolve via the Writer B cron once wired.
_meta.decay_rule: flag when rolling_90d_win_rate < 0.5 * historical_baseline (Satellite Strike Ch7)
_meta.win_definition: web: repo-canonical isCountedResolved (exclude simulated/gateBlocked/auto-expire sentinel pnlPct==0&&!hit on outcomes.24h), win = outcome.hit===true; scanner: TP1_HIT|EXPIRED_PROFIT
_meta.cross_source_note: The 50.8% baseline and zaky_strategy/tradingview_screener are SCANNER methodology (TP1_HIT|EXPIRED_PROFIT from signals.db). hmm-top3's win rate is WEB methodology (isCountedResolved + hit===true on signal-history.json). zaky/tv vs baseline is like-for-like; hmm-top3 vs the baseline is cross-method and only INDICATIVE — the stricter web win definition understates hmm-top3 against the looser scanner baseline. Satellite placement and the 'watch' call do not depend on this comparison.
_meta.satellite_framework: Satellite Strike Ch9 core/satellite split; aggressive strategies confined to the satellite sleeve (10-40% cap). Edge-decay per Ch7.

measured_strategies.source_citation: Operator-authored proprietary TradingView strategy, ported to H1/H4 multi-timeframe confluence (premium tier). Validated on real resolved scanner outcomes (scripts/signals.db). Not a textbook indicator system — discretionary method codified by the operator; production signal path documented in CLAUDE.md 'Signal Generation Architecture'.
measured_strategies.realized_rr: 0.26R mean over n=140 resolved trades (TP1/SL exits only; EXPIRED excluded).
measured_strategies.slippage: pending real data — no execution fills recorded locally (signal-time prices only)
measured_strategies.kill_date_review: 2026-07-20 — KEEP in core if rolling-90d holds >= 50.8% baseline; DEMOTE to satellite if it drops below 50.8%; auto-demote if it breaks the 25.4% (0.5x baseline) decay floor.
measured_strategies.measurement_caveat: LOCAL scanner/dev samples (apps/web/data/signal-history.json + scripts/signals.db) — NOT the production Railway Postgres verified record. Illustrative of the live engine; production rolling metrics resolve via the Writer B cron once wired. Highest-conviction core engine.

measured_strategies.source_citation: TradingView screener bulk-scan, filtered by MACD/EMA/RSI multi-timeframe confluence. Underlying indicators: MACD (Gerald Appel), RSI (J. Welles Wilder, 1978), plus EMA trend filter. Bulk-screener candidate generation, confluence-gated. Source: scripts/signals.db (scanner), source=tradingview_screener.
measured_strategies.realized_rr: 0.71R mean over n=21 resolved trades (thin RR sample; TP1/SL exits only).
measured_strategies.slippage: pending real data — no execution fills recorded locally (signal-time prices only)
measured_strategies.kill_date_review: 2026-07-25 — KEEP in satellite if rolling-90d recovers to >= 50.8% (promotion-review candidate); DEMOTE/KILL if rolling-90d falls below the 25.4% floor. Aggressive bulk-scan -> satellite-only, never core.
measured_strategies.measurement_caveat: LOCAL scanner/dev samples (apps/web/data/signal-history.json + scripts/signals.db) — NOT the production Railway Postgres verified record. Illustrative of the live engine; production rolling metrics resolve via the Writer B cron once wired. Aggressive high-throughput bulk-scan: many candidates, looser conviction than the core engine -> satellite-only even though auto_demote is currently false.

measured_strategies.source_citation: Hidden Markov Model regime classification (Hamilton 1989 regime-switching framework) selecting the top-3 confluence setups per scan; web app strategyId=hmm-top3. In-repo design: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-05-market-regime-strategies.md. Source: signal-history.json (web app, Writer A/B path).
measured_strategies.realized_rr: realized pnl mean -0.12% / median -0.45% (this id reports a pnl percent, NOT an R-multiple).
measured_strategies.slippage: pending real data — no execution fills recorded locally (signal-time prices only)
measured_strategies.kill_date_review: 2026-07-18 — keep on watch; DEMOTE/KILL if rolling-90d crosses below the 25.4% floor; promotion-review only if rolling-90d recovers toward the 50.8% baseline on n>=20.
measured_strategies.measurement_caveat: LOCAL scanner/dev samples (apps/web/data/signal-history.json + scripts/signals.db) — NOT the production Railway Postgres verified record. Illustrative of the live engine; production rolling metrics resolve via the Writer B cron once wired. by_mode: scalp 36.0% (114 resolved) vs swing 32.6% (218 resolved), both below baseline. The 24h outcome horizon (4h fallback) may understate slower swing setups; this explains the mechanism but does not change the number. Status WATCH (below 50.8% baseline, above 25.4% floor) -> satellite-only by discipline, not an auto-trigger.
